name: crew-bus
description: Talk to your local AI agent crew — Crew Boss, Guardian, Vault, and custom teams — directly from Claude.
long_description:
Crew Bus runs coordinated AI agent teams locally on your Mac. Install the Crew Bus Mac app (crew-bus.dev), then use this extension to let Claude talk to your crew through natural conversation.

Ask Crew Boss to plan your day, check what Guardian has flagged, search Vault's memory, monitor your teams, and post to team mailboxes — all without leaving Claude.

All agent processing happens on your Mac. Nothing hits the cloud unless you opt in.

tools.name: crewbus_list_agents
tools.description: List all crew members with their status, type, and role

tools.name: crewbus_send_message
tools.description: Send a message to a crew member and get their reply

tools.name: crewbus_get_agent_chat
tools.description: Get recent chat history with a crew member

tools.name: crewbus_get_crew_stats
tools.description: Get a dashboard overview of the crew — agent counts, trust score, energy

tools.name: crewbus_list_teams
tools.description: List all teams with their manager and member count

tools.name: crewbus_get_team_detail
tools.description: Get detailed info about a team including its agent list

tools.name: crewbus_get_message_feed
tools.description: Get recent crew message feed — inter-agent messages and bus events

tools.name: crewbus_search_agent_memory
tools.description: Search a crew member's memory — experiences, facts, learned info

tools.name: crewbus_get_agent_learnings
tools.description: Get what a crew member has learned — mistakes and what works well

tools.name: crewbus_get_audit_log
tools.description: Get recent crew audit events — actions, decisions, configuration changes

tools.name: crewbus_post_to_team_mailbox
tools.description: Post a message to a team mailbox on behalf of an agent
